MFA requires TOTP verification or the use of a recovery code after successful password verification during the login flow.
10 recovery codes are generated; they are single-use and permanently consumed upon use.

At rest: PII is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using per-tenant keys, and passwords use Argon2id. In transit: mTLS via Envoy and RDS requires sslmode=verify-full with global-bundle.pem.

The lifecycle includes Gateway schema validation, ALB rate limiting (1000/min/IP), handlePostLogin in the Auth Service, Argon2id verification, MFA verification, and issuance of RS256 access and refresh tokens.
